view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied as evidenced by the booking details.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for fixed-duration appointments, specifically 50 minutes, as indicated in the booking details from the 'customer-book-primary' step. The evidence shows that the booking has a 'durationMode' of 'fixed' and a 'defaultDurationMin' of 50, confirming that the system supports fixed-duration appointments. Additionally, the linked use case explicitly states the need for fixed-duration appointments, further supporting the requirement being met.
